title: Billing — Double Charge Refund Request
description: Frustrated customer asking for a refund after being charged twice. Tests Refund Request category, Negative sentiment, Finance routing.
subject: I was charged TWICE for my subscription — unacceptable
body:
Hello,

I am extremely disappointed. I just checked my credit card statement and I see TWO charges for $49 each on June 28 from your company. I only have ONE subscription. This is ridiculous.

I want an immediate refund for the duplicate charge. I expect a response today — this kind of error is unacceptable for a paid service.

I have attached my invoice (INV-2026-0091) for your reference.

Marcus Johnson
Account: marcus.j@gmail.com
Card ending: 4242
